description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular slide. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured surface for enhanced handling and control, and the trigger guard is generously sized and slightly undercut for improved finger placement. The slide features subtle serrations at the rear for easier manipulation, and the barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and lacks external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and seamlessly integrated with the grip, showing no visible extensions or finger rests. There are no visible manufacturer markings, logos, or serial numbers on the slide, giving the handgun a clean and utilitarian appearance.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, angular slide, and a flat magazine base. The design is clean and modern, with no visible markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the barrel opening and the front sight, with the slide and trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile of the slide, grip, and trigger guard, highlighting the texturing on the grip and the clean, unmarked slide.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip, the rear sight, and the slide serrations, with the magazine base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slide, grip, and trigger guard, with the safety lever and slide release faintly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and a checkered texture pattern for secure handling. It appears to be made of a matte black polymer, providing a non-slip surface. The grip lacks visible finger grooves but is subtly shaped to fit the hand comfortably, with a slight flare at the base for improved retention. There are no visible logos or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a slight undercut at the rear to allow for a higher grip. It is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its size accommodates gloved fingers. The design is functional and unadorned, lacking any integrated accessories or squared-off edges.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded profile. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or distinctive features are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with only subtle serrations at the rear for grip.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It is smoothly integrated into the grip's contour and lacks any visible logos or texturing.
